title: Untitled
content: Spoken Tutorial Jaypee University Information and Technology, has partnered with IIT Bombay so that students can enhance their future prospects by taking Skills and Certificates on a range of popular & lucrative Software courses through Spoken Tutorial Program (www.spoken-tutorial.org) . The university agrees to include Spoken Tutorials as MOOCs for practical courses, wherever possible. University ensures that all the department are taking the benefits of the program. For the list of the program find the E-Brochure. The training focuses on providing Computer/Software training to the students associated with University. These training will be held in the computer lab through distance learning mode. Nodal Centre for Spoken Tutorial - MOU signed by IIT Bombay and JUIT with effect from 11 June, 2012 pdf Jaypee University of Information Technology, Solan is assoicated with Spoken Tutorial Project, IIT Bombay for providing ICT based teaching and learning. (pdf) To Get Register Click Here CALENDAR 2019 EVEN SEMESTER EVENTS Staff Training Program (STP) on "LibraOffice Suit Writer, Math , Cal & Impress" : 8th - 28th June, 2017 Inauguration of FOSS Inauguration of Spoken Tutorial SPOKEN TUTORIAL SEMESTER PLAN FOR 3 YEARS Spoken Tutorial Semester Plan for 3 years
